description: Lock adjacent chronology and edge-semantics corrections that keep postwar materials science from being used as an anachronistic hard dependency.

checks.reason: The jet-airliner node is anchored to the de Havilland Comet's first commercial passenger jet service.
Deep drilling should not depend directly on the later broad postwar materials-science discipline.
Commercial aviation is deployment context for jet airliners.
Materials-science knowledge accelerated safer jet-airliner scaling after early fatigue failures.
